Hero.about: My code is the means, but the user experience is the end goal.

AboutPage.title: About me
AboutPage.disclamer: Passionate about transforming problems into simple solutions.
AboutPage.name: John Correa (Gin)
AboutPage.description: I am a frontend developer with experience in creating modern and responsive user interfaces. I specialize in React, TypeScript and TailwindCSS.

Projects.title: Projects in which I have participated

Experience.title: On the way
Experience.description: Specialized in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, HTML, CSS, TailwindCSS; with additional experience in e-commerce platforms like VTEX IO. I work on both custom solutions and integrations within existing platforms, always focusing on user experience. I enjoy sharing knowledge with my team as much as learning from it, and I keep constantly training to face new technical challenges

infracommerce.description: Development of e-commerce from scratch and maintenance of sites in production, with a focus on performance optimization, technical SEO and usability improvements. Landing page markup and integrations with the platform and third-party services.

blacksip.description: Continuous construction and optimization of e-commerce stores, prioritizing loading speed, SEO and user experience. Development of landing pages and integrations between the platform and external systems.
